chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Circumambulates or Performs Any of the Rites Without Ablution

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ تَقْضِيَ اَلْمَنَاسِكَ كُلَّهَا عَلَى غَيْرِ وُضُوءٍ إِلاَّ اَلطَّوَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ اَلْوُضُوءُ أَفْضَلُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2810 - It is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"There is no harm in completing all the rituals without being in a state of wudu, except for the tawaf around the Kaaba. However, performing wudu is better."
